title: L67 - work_service_breaches
description: SLA breach records — incidents where service performance (L65) violates defined SLOs (L66). Triggers automated remediation planning (L68) and alerting. Complete self-healing loop: breach -> plan -> remediate -> revalidate.

slo_id.description: FK to L66 work_service_level_objectives (RESTRICT on delete). Which SLO was breached.

service_id.description: FK to L62 work_factory_services (RESTRICT on delete). Which service breached SLO.

breach_detected_at.description: When the breach was first detected (ISO8601 timestamp)

breach_resolved_at.description: When the breach was resolved (ISO8601 timestamp, null if still active)

duration_minutes.description: Total breach duration in minutes (calculated when resolved)

severity.description: Breach severity based on SLO thresholds

metric_name.description: Which metric breached (copied from SLO for convenience)

target_value.description: Target value for the metric (copied from SLO)

actual_value.description: Actual measured value that triggered breach

threshold_breached.description: Threshold value that was breached (warning or critical)

measurement_window_hours.description: Measurement window during which breach was detected (copied from SLO)

impact_assessment.description: Human-readable impact description (e.g., 'Service unavailable for 23 minutes', '150 requests failed')

root_cause_hypothesis.description: Initial hypothesis about root cause (updated during investigation)

affected_requests.description: FK array to L63 work_service_requests. Requests affected by this breach.

failed_runs.description: FK array to L64 work_service_runs. Failed runs contributing to breach.

notification_sent.description: Whether notifications were sent per SLO.notification_channels

remediation_plan_id.description: FK to L68 work_service_remediation_plans (SET_NULL). Remediation plan for this breach.

revalidation_result_id.description: FK to L69 work_service_revalidation_results (SET_NULL). Post-remediation verification.

notes.description: Additional investigation notes or resolution details

created_by.description: Identifier of creator (typically automated breach detection system)
